_meta.note: This is the reference translation. All keys present here must exist in every language file. To add a new language, copy this file and translate the values. To contribute, open a PR on GitHub.

app.title: MemDBG
connect.no_console_before_processes: Connect a console before loading processes
connect.no_console_before_maps: Connect a console before refreshing maps
settings.title: Settings
settings.confirm_reset: Reset all connection settings to defaults? Host, TCP port, UDP port, and dump path will be reverted.
settings.runtime_desc: MemDBG expects the payload to be running on the console. The app opens a TCP command session, while UDP logs can be received independently.
settings.crash_logging_hint: Write status and notification logs to a crash-log file. Data survives application crashes.
settings.taskmgr_prefetch_on_connect: Prefetch Task Manager data after connecting
settings.taskmgr_prefetch_hint: Load processes, metadata, and memory-map summaries in the background after a payload connection opens. Disabled by default.
settings.payload_auto_fetch_hint: Automatically download the latest MemDBG payload binary from GitHub releases. The file is cached locally for quick access.
settings.payload_platform_hint: Filter GitHub release assets by target console. Use Auto to match any available payload.
payload.outdated_hint: The connected payload is older than the latest GitHub release. Update for new features and fixes.
settings.language_hint: Select the display language. Changes apply immediately.
home.connect_first_for_processes: Connect a console before loading processes
home.connect_first_for_memory: Connect a console before reading memory
home.connect_first_for_scan: Connect a console before scanning memory
home.connect_first_for_trainer: Connect a console before using trainer locks
consoles.confirm_shutdown: Shut down the remote payload? This will terminate the MemDBG instance on the console.
consoles.confirm_disconnect: Disconnect from the console? All active breakpoints and watchpoints will be lost.
consoles.runtime_desc: The frontend talks to the payload over the debug TCP port and listens for telemetry on UDP.
processes.connect_first_desc: Process enumeration is available after a payload session is open.
processes.waiting_desc: Connect first, then choose a process to request maps.
processes.dump_dir_tooltip: Fallback directory for dumps when the save dialog is unavailable (console) or cancelled
processes.no_process_desc: Select a process, then refresh maps to inspect memory ranges.
processes.scan_window_set: Process scan window set from filtered maps
processes.create_dump_dir2_failed: Failed to create process dump directory
processes.elf_target_region_tip: VM region to load into (basename, wildcard, or empty = allocate new)
processes.elf_match_regex_tip: Treat target as POSIX extended regex (^lib, \.so$, etc.)
processes.elf_match_fullpath_tip: Match against the full path instead of just the basename
processes.elf_dropped_invalid: Dropped file is not a valid ELF: %s
processes.elf_arch_mismatch_tip: The ELF architecture does not match the connected console. Loading will fail or crash the target process.
processes.elf_hijack_confirm_desc: This spawns a thread inside the selected process and resumes it. The target may crash or behave unexpectedly.
memory.byte_format_hint: Accepted byte formats: DEADBEEF or DE AD BE EF
memory.auto_refresh_tip: Re-read the memory buffer at regular intervals (0.1–5.0 s)
memory.no_memory_desc: Read memory from the selected process to populate this view.
memory.allocations.overlap: current memory view overlaps freed allocation %s
memory.exploit.rop_skeleton: ROP skeleton: rdi=%s rsi=%s rdx=%s rax=%s syscall=%s
scanner.structure_compare_desc: Read a player structure and one or two enemy structures. Player vs enemies highlights fields where the player differs while both enemies agree.
scanner.unknown_desc: Saves every aligned value in process memory as a baseline. Refine with Changed/Unchanged afterwards.
scanner.copy_all_tooltip: Copy all %u addresses to clipboard, one per line
scanner.length_zero: Scan length must be greater than zero
scanner.end_filter_error: End filter must be greater than start, or 0x0
scanner.no_unknown_cap: Payload does not support unknown value scan
scanner.individual_reads: Using individual memory_read — payload lacks BATCH_READ support
trainer.batchcode_hint: Tokens: offset:0x... value:0x... size:n, also AOB: pattern:??...
trainer.confirm_clear_disabled: Remove all disabled trainer entries? This cannot be undone.
trainer.copy_all_tooltip: Copy all %zu addresses to clipboard, one per line
trainer.no_entries_desc: Add scan hits or manual addresses to build a runtime cheat list.
trainer.select_process_first: Select a process before adding a trainer entry
trainer.select_process_for_batch: Select a process before importing batchcode
pointer_scanner.title: Pointer Scanner
pointer_scanner.target_tooltip: The address you want to find pointers to (e.g. a scan hit)
pointer_scanner.range_tooltip: Memory range to search for pointer candidates
pointer_scanner.desc: The scanner finds values in the search range that, when dereferenced, point to the target address. Useful for finding stable base pointers.
pointer_scanner.copy_all_tooltip: Copy all %u addresses to clipboard, one per line
pointer_scanner.no_pointers_desc: No values in the search range point to the target address.
pointer_scanner.ready_desc: Enter a target address and scan range, then press Scan.
aob_scanner.title: AOB Pattern Scan
aob_scanner.process_wide_desc: Scan all readable memory maps in the target process.
aob_scanner.leave_zero: Leave 0x0 to scan the entire address space.
aob_scanner.tips_desc: Patterns like 48 8B ?? ?? are efficient — the payload uses the first known byte to skip regions quickly.
aob_scanner.copy_all_tooltip: Copy all %u addresses to clipboard, one per line
aob_scanner.no_hits_desc: The pattern was not found in the selected range.
aob_scanner.ready_desc: Enter an AOB pattern and scan range, then press Scan.
logs.confirm_clear: Clear all captured UDP log messages?
logs.no_messages_desc: Payload telemetry will appear here after the console sends datagrams.
telemetry.title: Payload Telemetry
telemetry.require_payload_desc: Connect to a console running the MemDBG payload to see runtime telemetry.
telemetry.not_supported_desc:
The connected payload does not advertise the PERF_TELEMETRY capability.
Update to a newer payload build to enable performance telemetry.
telemetry.polling_desc:
Waiting for the first telemetry response from the payload.
Check the status bar for errors if this persists.
telemetry.paused_scan: Telemetry polling is paused while a scan is running.
telemetry.no_cache_activity: No process map cache activity yet.
telemetry.cache_hint: Run a map refresh or process-wide scan to populate this section.
telemetry.lru_info: LRU cache: 8 PID entries  |  TTL: 5 seconds
telemetry.throughput_unavailable: Throughput rate unavailable until the payload reports a valid monotonic uptime.
credits.creator: Creator: %s (@%s)
credits.description: MemDBG is a high-performance memory debugging suite designed for PlayStation 4 and PlayStation 5 homebrew research. It combines a precise memory scanning engine with a remote debugging frontend, providing a unified interface for process inspection, memory analysis, and runtime debugging workflows.
credits.license: License: GNU General Public License v3.0 or later
common.no_memory_desc: Read memory from the selected process to populate this view.
common.payload_details_after_hello: Payload details will appear after HELLO.
empty_state.process_enum_desc: Process enumeration is available after a payload session is open.
empty_state.no_process_desc: Select a process, then refresh maps to inspect memory ranges.
taskmgr.title: Task Manager
taskmgr.no_session: No console session — system overview unavailable.
taskmgr.refresh_detail_tip: Re-fetch process info and memory maps
taskmgr.connect_first_desc: Process monitoring is available after a payload session is open.
taskmgr.refresh_hint: Press Refresh Processes to load the process list.
taskmgr.select_pid_hint: Select a process in the table to see memory and resource details.
taskmgr.confirm_kill: Send SIGKILL to this process? This will immediately terminate it.
debugger.title: Debugger
debugger.unsupported: This payload does not support the debugger. Update to a newer build.
debugger.connect_first: Connect a console before using the debugger.
debugger.pause_on_attach_tip: Keep the target stopped after attach; disable it to resume after the initial thread/register snapshot.
debugger.auto_refresh_on_stop_tip: Automatically refresh registers and threads when the target stops (breakpoint, watchpoint, or manual stop).
debugger.confirm_clear_bp: Clear all breakpoints? This cannot be undone.
debugger.confirm_clear_wp: Clear all watchpoints? This cannot be undone.
debugger.confirm_detach: Detach will clear all breakpoints and watchpoints. Continue?
tracer.title: Tracer
scanner.structure_compare.connect_first: Connect a console before comparing structures
scanner.structure_compare.select_process: Select a process before comparing structures
scanner.structure_compare.no_mem_reads: Payload does not support memory reads
scanner.structure_compare.invalid_addres: Enter valid player and enemy structure addresses
scanner.structure_compare.invalid_size: Structure size must be a field-width multiple between 1 and 65536 bytes
scanner.scan_connect_first_notify: Connect a console before scanning processes
consoles.no_payloads_found: No MemDBG payloads found on the local network.
debugger.threads_worker_did_not_start: Threads: refresh worker did not start
debugger.patch_needs_on_off: Patch must have ON and OFF bytes before trainer export
debugger.select_valid_pid: Select a valid PID before attaching
debugger.trainer_entry_added_patch: Trainer entry added from Patch Studio
processes.dump_dir_failed: Failed to create process dump directory
processes.json_dump_placeholder: JSON output will appear here after requesting a dump.
trainer.search_cheats: Search cheats by game, ID, or title...
trainer.no_cheats_desc: Try another search term or refresh sources to download cheat catalogs.
trainer.confirm_load_trainer:
Load these cheats into the Trainer?

This will replace the current cheat list with the selected cheat file's mods.
trainer.select_process: Select a process before adding a trainer entry
trainer.select_before_batchcode: Select a process before importing batchcode
trainer.wait_active: Wait for the active operation to finish
scanner.no_exact_range: Payload does not support exact range scans
scanner.no_unknown: Payload does not support unknown scans
scanner.valid_range: Enter a valid start and non-zero length
scanner.run_before_baseline: Run a scan before refreshing the baseline
tracer.select_pid: Select a valid PID before attaching the tracer
app.maps_refresh_in_progress: Memory maps refresh already in progress
app.wait_active: Wait for the active operation to finish
app.maps_refresh_discarded: Memory maps refresh discarded: selected process changed
app.connect_before_processes: Connect a console before refreshing processes
app.connect_before_load: Connect a console before loading processes
plugins.desktop_bridge: GUI plugins use the desktop bridge on this build.
discovery.none_found: No MemDBG payloads found on the local network.
klog.title: Kernel Log
klog.connect_first: Connect to a console payload first
klog.no_data_desc: Connect to the console and start streaming kernel logs. Data appears in real time.
credits.donations_link: Donations link is available in the desktop credits
tracer.select_pid_global: Select a process from the topbar first
settings.sandbox_enabled_tip: Disable to allow plugins unrestricted access. Re-enable to apply the individual restrictions below.
settings.sandbox_filesystem_tip: Allow plugins to read/write files via the io library.
settings.sandbox_subprocess_tip: Allow plugins to execute shell commands via os.execute().
settings.sandbox_network_tip: Allow plugins to make network connections via socket libraries.
settings.sandbox_native_modules_tip: Allow plugins to load native .so/.dll modules via package.loadlib.
settings.sandbox_whitelist_tip: Comma-separated list of Lua modules allowed via require(). Empty = block all. Example: table, string, mymodule
settings.sandbox_confirm_disable_desc: This will allow plugins unrestricted access to filesystem, shell commands, network connections, and native modules. Only disable if you trust all installed plugins. This can be re-enabled at any time.
